title: stachys glandulibracteata
intro: Stachys glandulibracteata, also known as Mexican woundwort, is a perennial herbaceous plant native to Mexico. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic effects. The health benefits of Stachys glandulibracteata include its ability to treat wounds, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs. Herbal preparations of the plant can be found in teas, tinctures, and infusions, which are commonly used to soothe skin irritations and promote wound healing.
